title: Tinkers Construct (Useful Slime)
description: Makes the Slimesling in to the Tinkers' Construct style.
body:
This resource pack transforms the base texture of the Slimesling from  [useful slime](https://modrinth.com/mod/useful-slime) look like the Slimesling from [Tinkers' Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct), it can be used in all version of minecraft.
 
Requires: [useful slime](https://modrinth.com/mod/useful-slime) to function.
![Slimesling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c096bf04956be647caf0b2f6a463cc4f9b420805.png)
